note: Vectors from 29 CFR §1607.4(D) 4/5ths adverse-impact rule. Known constant: 4/5ths threshold = 0.8. golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: air_0778_below_threshold_flagged
vectors.description: Protected 70/100 vs control 90/100: AIR = 0.7778 below 0.8 threshold -- ADVERSE_IMPACT_FLAGGED. Known: 70/90 = 0.7778.

output_payload.zero_pii_confirmation: Inputs are aggregate count data only. No individual applicant records processed.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 29 CFR §1607.4(D) (EEOC UGSP); ECOA 15 USC §1691; 12 CFR Part 1002 (Reg B); HMDA 12 USC §2801; OCC Fair Lending Handbook 2020
output_payload.table_source: 29 CFR Part 1607 Uniform Guidelines on Employee Selection Procedures (Federal Register 43 FR 38290 1978-08-25); CFPB HMDA Examination Procedures; OCC Fair Lending Handbook Oct 2020
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are aggregate count data only. No individual applicant records are processed. Zero PII by construction.

vectors.name: air_0889_above_threshold_pass
vectors.description: Protected 80/100 vs control 90/100: AIR = 0.8889 >= 0.8 threshold -- PASS. Confirms 0.8 threshold correctly applied.

output_payload.zero_pii_confirmation: Inputs are aggregate count data only. No individual applicant records processed.

output_payload.table_source: 29 CFR Part 1607 Uniform Guidelines on Employee Selection Procedures (Federal Register 43 FR 38290 1978-08-25); CFPB HMDA Examination Procedures; OCC Fair Lending Handbook Oct 2020
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are aggregate count data only. No individual applicant records are processed. Zero PII by construction.

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty inputs (zero totals) return finite zero-state with INSUFFICIENT_DATA flag.
